title: England central banker says global stablecoin rules will 'grapple' with US
message_html: England central banker says global stablecoin rules will 'grapple' with US ...
snippet: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey says regulators will have to deal with the US when forming global stablecoin standards.

title: SUI spikes 50% amid staking moves, zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push
message_html: SUI spikes 50% amid staking moves, zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push ...
snippet: Adeniyi Abiodun, co-founder of Mysten Labs, announced at an event in Miami plans for zero-fee stablecoin transfers on Sui and reiterated the ambition to add private transactions.
